name: Sakar Healthcare Limited
summary: Sakar Healthcare Limited manufactures and sells pharmaceutical products in India. It offers pharmaceutical products in various forms, such as oral liquid syrups and suspensions, cephalosporin dry powder injections, liquid injectable in ampoules and vials, and lyophilized injections, as well as cephalosporin tablets, and capsules. The company also develops oncology products. It exports its products to approximately 38 countries, including South East Asia, Asia, Africa-Anglo and Francophone, MENA countries, and America. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
